title: fraxinus oxycarpa var. oxyphylla
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa var. oxyphylla, also known as the Manchurian ash, is a deciduous tree species belonging to the olive family (Oleaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Fraxinus oxycarpa var. oxyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the tree's bark and leaves are often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various health conditions.
